narrative:
Twinsburg 4-B (precinct in Summit County) has 948 registered voters, with 47.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.4%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.5 percentage points.
